comparison_base_assumption: c0adf5c was used as the comparison base because the handoff identified it as the base before the SSW-DFH-001 implementer/tester commits and the branch history confirms it immediately precedes the implementation commit.
test_sufficiency_summary: Verifier validation passed with `cd tests && make && ./SSWTests` reporting `OK (170 tests)`, but regression coverage is insufficient for the DCR non-cumulative repeat-hit criterion because it only covers DCR already at zero.
documentation_accuracy_summary: The no-product-doc-change decision is accurate. doc/rules/tactical_operations_manual.md already documents drive hits at zero, non-cumulative damage-control/combat-control hits, second fires, and unavailable or already-destroyed system hits falling back to hull damage.

commands_run.output_summary: Reviewed combined implementation, test, and artifact diff surface.

findings.summary: Repeated Damage Control hits remain cumulative while DCR is above zero instead of falling back to hull damage after the first DCR hit.
The DCR regression only covers an already-zero DCR state, missing the non-cumulative repeat-hit case for partially damaged DCR.
